flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Midland University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.7k → $42.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Midland University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($36.7k → $42.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Midland University fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (42.1% → 36.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Midland University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
